laplace.name: Laplace (Treasure)

findings: burst re-authored to official prose (897.6/14.52/5s weaponSwap, only rider is true dmg) — current file traced to OLD fan text (1455.72/22.2/trueNormals); fbGate over-fire fixed

✅ RESOLVED 2026-07-17 (favorite-item sync): REVERTED the wave-6 downgrade — the 'old fan text' values were the TREASURE kit. Restored burst First 1455.72/Normal 22.2/10s + weaponSwap trueNormals + the 11.9 rider; S2a lastBullet 81.66 → shotFired full-charge 132.45. DBG-confirmed. Model-only.

laplace.evidence: Pure model — bare override, never validated

skill1: Activates when attacking with Full Charge. Affects self. Hero Vision: Explosion Radius ▲ 3.57%, stacks up to 5, 15s.
skill2: Activates when hitting the target's Parts. Affects the target's body. Deals 14.78% of final ATK as additional damage.

caveats: burst: bazooka beam economy is UNMEASURED — 0.25s/tick + reload-free are ⚑ estimates over the 10s window; count beam popups in any focus video
burst: the swap beam (22.2%, true at max Hero Vision) and the 11.9% true rider both assume Hero Vision is at max stacks for the whole window (⚑ uptime haircut candidate)
burst: 'Gains Pierce' not modeled — no swap-gated pierce mechanism; inert at scope lock (no pierce-damage buffs in kit, pierce core-double disabled)
skill2: the 132.45% full-charge additional hit is modeled on shotFired (every RL pull = one full charge); if a focus video shows it not firing every charged shot, retune the trigger
skill1: Explosion Radius ▲ is inert vs the partless boss; its stacks only gate the burst true damage (assumed maxed)
